Title: Initialize React Native Project
Body:
## Description
Set up Expo-based React Native project for senior mobile app with proper folder structure

## Expected Deliverable
`senior-app/` directory with Expo configuration

## Acceptance Criteria
- Expo project initialized with TypeScript
- Proper folder structure created
- Basic navigation setup
- Accessibility configuration included

## Suggested Commit Message
`feat: initialize React Native senior app with Expo`

Title: Design Main Screen Layout
Body:
## Description
Create main screen with 3 large, clearly labeled buttons (Call, SOS, Photos)

## Expected Deliverable
`MainScreen.tsx` component

## Acceptance Criteria
- Three large, clearly labeled buttons
- High contrast design (WCAG 2.2 compliant)
- Touch-friendly sizing (minimum 44pt)
- Plain language labels
- Single action per button

## Suggested Commit Message
`feat: implement main screen with 3 core action buttons`

## Related Documentation
See [scope.md#simplicity-and-design-rules](./scope.md#simplicity-and-design-rules) for design requirements

Title: Implement High-Contrast Theme
Body:
## Description
Create accessibility-focused theme with large typography (18pt+) and high contrast colors

## Expected Deliverable
`theme.ts` and `styles.ts` files

## Acceptance Criteria
- Typography ≥ 18pt minimum
- High contrast color scheme
- WCAG 2.2 AA compliance
- Dark/light mode support
- Consistent spacing system

## Suggested Commit Message
`feat: add high-contrast theme with large typography`

## Related Documentation
See [scope.md#simplicity-and-design-rules](./scope.md#simplicity-and-design-rules) for accessibility requirements

Title: Create SOS Alert System
Body:
